heading: Can I use a single MongoDB SRV connection string for a multi-region cluster with private link?
body:
Yes, you can use a single SRV (DNS Service Record) connection string for a multi-region cluster
with Private Link in MongoDB Atlas. The SRV (DNS Service Record) connection string automatically
resolves to the appropriate nodes across regions.
However, ensure that your network setup allows for cross-region connectivity
through private endpoints. For AWS (Amazon Web Services) and Azure (Microsoft Azure), this involves setting up VPC/VNet
peering between regions. For Google Cloud, you need to configure global access for Private Service Connect.

To learn more, see the documentation for [Learn About Private Endpoints in Atlas](private-endpoint-overview).
